title: 🚫 Final Loop Destabilizers
name: Final Loop Destabilizers
what_it_is: Mechanisms, figures, or actions that break infinite mythic loops—glitches, shocks, or emotional thresholds that shatter recursive repetition.
how_to_use: she says the unsayable—the loop collapses
his love doesn’t fit the script—it breaks the recursion
animation_behavior: Loops stutter then fracture, time resets shatter in sparks, forbidden action destabilizes narrative path
